title: Sparkle seed
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Sparkleseed.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The Gonster holds a jar of sparkle seeds.]]
'''Sparkle seed''' was a type of [[Seed/Legends|seed]] that had special abilities. [[Gonster]] of the [[Twin Hills]] used sparkle seeds to power the [[magic cap]], a piece of clothing which could neutralize the [[Raich]]. When poured on top of the hat, the sparkle seeds activated the cap's powers. The cap could then be placed on the Raich's head to trap it as a tree.

The [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] once obtained sparkle seeds from the Gonster during the Raich's [[Raich crisis|temporary return]]. During the final showdown with the creature, Teebo was able to put a handful of the seeds onto the cap just before [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] placed it on the Raich's head. The addition of the seeds stopped the Raich and turned him back into a harmless tree.

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|The Raich}}
